categories.name: Wax Sachets
categories.description: Handcrafted wax sachets designed for wardrobes, drawers, cars, gym bags, bedside areas, and other closed spaces.

categories.name: Candles
categories.description: Hand-poured candles crafted for a slow, clean, aesthetic burn with premium fragrance blends.

products.name: Simple Sachet
products.description: Simple wax sachet with artificial embedded flowers. Available in any fragrance or shape.

products.description: Colour wax sachet with artificial embedded flowers. Available in any fragrance, shape, or colour.

products.description: Colour wax sachet with wax embedded design. Available in any fragrance, shape, or colour.

products.description: Premium colour wax sachet with wax embedded design. Available in any fragrance, shape, or colour.

products.name: Sunshine Bouquet
products.description: Handcrafted mini sunflower bouquet, perfect for small and meaningful gifting. Available in any fragrance.

products.name: Brewed Bliss
products.description: Iced coffee themed candle, 200 ml. Fragrance: Coffee Latte. Burn time: 18-20 hrs. A rich, cozy candle inspired by iced coffee and crafted for a warm cafe-like mood.

products.name: Sunkissed Shore
products.description: Beach themed candle, 200 ml. Fragrance: Sea Breeze. Burn time: 16-18 hrs. Designed to bring a fresh, relaxing ocean-inspired ambience into your space.

products.name: Lavender Bloom
products.description: Calm moments in a jar, 200 ml. Burn time: 16-18 hrs. A lavender-inspired candle for self-care, evenings, gifting, and a luxurious decor accent.

products.name: The Arch Aura
products.description: The Sculpted Silhouette candle. Burn time: 20-24 hrs. Available in any fragrance. A sculptural candle designed to create a sophisticated and calming ambience.
